description: The company is migrating to a secure, air-gapped container registry. Configure the 'production-apps' namespace to authenticate to this new registry and migrate all running applications to the new image paths using the details in /home/ga/Desktop/registry_credentials.txt. The namespace must use a docker-registry secret linked to the default ServiceAccount, and all three deployments must be updated to pull from the new registry. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!.
